name: BAM — Background Activity Moderator
categoryDescription: Program execution evidence beyond the Uninstall/Amcache layer — BAM, SRUM, Syscache, and configuration affecting execution artifacts.
description: BAM tracks last execution time of every executable per user SID — populated by the Background Activity Moderator driver starting Windows 10 1709. Contains full binary path and last execution FILETIME.
forensic_value: One of the most reliable execution time artifacts — records the last execution timestamp for any binary that ran, even portables with no install footprint. Persists after file deletion. Each user SID has its own subkey with per-binary entries.
